subject: [WIP] Implement missing DCM features
commit_message:
[WIP] Implement missing DCM features

- Now calling rsync over gRPC
- Implemented Terminate handler (/terminate)
- K8s resources are being created:
  - ns, resourcequota, role, rolebinding, csr
- Working for multiple clusters simultaneously
- Now storing logical cloud user private key in MongoDB
- Fixed special characters issue in resource quotas
- Partial PoC (including in rsync) to do csr approval
- Implemented new /kubeconfig API for obtaining kubeconfig
  per lc/cluster:
  - includes CA cert, address and user private key..
    only lacking the signed user cert
- Added a lot more HTTP return codes to the API
- Pass csr approval via /resource/<csr>/subresource/approval
  (includes order/dependency)
- Implemented lazy-loading of certificate per-cluster when
  client calls kubeconfig API
- Added CSR resource to monitor, which is now writing the full
  CSR to the resourcebundlestate when there's a change (like approval)

Final patchset fixed to make it work with current asynchronous nature
of rsync, for reference. Will abandon and submit smaller, individual
patchsets for each of the features/changes implemented.

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1143
Signed-off-by: Igor D.C <igor.duarte.cardoso@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ie0bc18f366f7f95045f1b50e2e316b3e5d22e77e
